lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਕਉ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam tinaa kau miliaa jin kau dhur likh paaeaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone obtain the Name, who have such pre-ordained destiny. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਕਰਤਿਆ ਨਿਹਫਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਨ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa karatiaa nihafal janam gavaaeaa sukhadaataa man na vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Involved in worldly affairs, he wastes his life in vain; the peace-giving Lord does not come to abide in his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਭਰਪੂਰੁ ਹੈ ਮਨਮੁਖਾ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ghar hee meh amrit bharapoor hai manamukhaa saad na paaeaa |
lines.english: The home within is filled with Ambrosial Nectar, but the self-willed manmukh does not get to taste it.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਤਜਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹੈ ਕਰਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਖੁਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: amrit taj bikh sangrahai karatai aap khuaaeaa |
lines.english: The manmukh forsakes the Ambrosial Nectar, and instead gathers poison; the Creator Himself has fooled him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਕਸਤੂਰੀ ਮਿਰਗੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਭ੍ਰਮਦਾ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jiau kasatooree mirag na jaanai bhramadaa bharam bhulaaeaa |
lines.english: He is like the deer, who does not recognize its own musk-scent; it wanders around, deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹੋਇਆ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਦੁ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tan man seetal hoeaa rasanaa har saad aaeaa |
lines.english: Their minds and bodies are cooled and soothed, and their tongues enjoy the sublime taste of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਈ ਤਿਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh virale sojhee pee tinaa andar braham dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: How rare are the Gurmukhs, who obtain this understanding; they behold the Lord God within themselves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਹੀ ਨਾਉ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabade hee naau aoopajai sabade mel milaaeaa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Shabad, the Name wells up; through the Shabad, we are united in the Lord's Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਬਉਰਾਨਾ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai sabh jag bauraanaa birathaa janam gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, the whole world is insane, and it loses its life in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਏਕੋ ਸਬਦੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: amrit eko sabad hai naanak guramukh paaeaa |2|
lines.english: The Shabad alone is Ambrosial Nectar; O Nanak, the Gurmukhs obtain it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਹੈ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: so har purakh agam hai kahu kit bidh paaeeai |
lines.english: The Lord God is inaccessible; tell me, how can we find Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖ ਅਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੁ ਕਹੁ ਜਨ ਕਿਉ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: tis roop na rekh adrisatt kahu jan kiau dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: He has no form or feature, and He cannot be seen; tell me, how can we meditate on Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jis aap bujhaae aap su har maarag paaeeai |
lines.english: They alone walk on the Lord's Path, whom the Lord Himself instructs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮੁ ਕਿਆ ਕਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: nirankaar niranjan har agam kiaa keh gun gaaeeai |
lines.english: The Lord is formless, immaculate and inaccessible; which of His Virtues should we speak of and sing?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤਨੁ ਕੋਲੂ ਪੀੜੀਐ ਰਤੁ ਨ ਭੋਰੀ ਡੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jiau tan koloo peerreeai rat na bhoree ddehi |
lines.english: It is as if my body has been crushed in the oil-press, without yielding even a drop of blood;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਵੇਖਾਲਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur poorai vekhaaliaa gur sevaa paaeeai |4|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has revealed Him to me; serving the Guru, He is found. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਵੰਞੈ ਚਉ ਖੰਨੀਐ ਸਚੇ ਸੰਦੜੈ ਨੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo vanyai chau khaneeai sache sandarrai nehi |
lines.english: it is as if my soul has been cut apart into pieces for the sake of the Love of the True Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਲੁ ਨ ਚੁਕਈ ਰਾਤੀ ਅਤੈ ਡੇਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak mel na chukee raatee atai ddeh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, still, night and day, my Union with the Lord is not broken. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮਾਜੀਠੈ ਕਪੜੇ ਰੰਗੇ ਭੀ ਪਾਹੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jiau maajeetthai kaparre range bhee paahehi |
lines.english: like the fabric which is treated to retain the color of the dye.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣੁ ਮੈਡਾ ਰੰਗੁਲਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਏ ਮਨੁ ਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sajan maiddaa rangulaa rang laae man lee |
lines.english: My Friend is so full of joy and love; He colors my mind with the color of His Love,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਬਿਆ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਕੇਹ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak rang na utarai biaa na lagai keh |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, this color does not depart, and no other color can be imparted to this fabric. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਲਾਇਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: har aap varatai aap har aap bulaaeidaa |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is pervading everywhere; the Lord Himself causes us to chant His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਇਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: har aape srisatt savaar sir dhandhai laaeidaa |
lines.english: The Lord Himself created the creation; He commits all to their tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਇ ਇਕਿ ਆਪਿ ਖੁਆਇਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa bhagatee laae ik aap khuaaeidaa |
lines.english: He engages some in devotional worship, and others, He causes to stray.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਇ ਇਕਿ ਉਝੜਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa maarag paae ik ujharr paaeidaa |
lines.english: He places some on the Path, while He leads others into the wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam dhiaae guramukh gun gaaeidaa |5|
lines.english: Servant Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; as Gurmukh, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਣਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man chindiaa fal paavanaa haumai vichahu jaae |
lines.english: The fruits of the mind's desires are obtained, and egotism departs from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਫਲੁ ਹੈ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਕਰੇ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee sevaa safal hai je ko kare chit laae |
lines.english: Service to the True Guru is fruitful and rewarding, if one performs it with his mind focused on it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਤੋੜੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਸਚੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bandhan torrai mukat hoe sache rahai samaae |
lines.english: His bonds are broken, and he is liberated; he remains absorbed in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਲਭੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis jag meh naam alabh hai guramukh vasai man aae |
lines.english: It is so difficult to obtain the Naam in this world; it comes to dwell in the mind of the Gurmukh.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jo gur seveh aapanaa hau tin balihaarai jaau |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to one who serves his True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੰਨੁ ਅਜਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਗੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh man ajit hai doojai lagai jaae |
lines.english: The mind of the self-willed manmukh is so very stubborn; it is stuck in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਨਹੀ ਦੁਖੇ ਦੁਖਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis no sukh supanai nahee dukhe dukh vihaae |
lines.english: He does not find peace, even in dreams; he passes his life in misery and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਥਕੇ ਸਿਧ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ghar ghar parr parr panddit thake sidh samaadh lagaae |
lines.english: The Pandits have grown weary of going door to door, reading and reciting their scriptures; the Siddhas have gone into their trances of Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਵਸਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਥਕੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man vas na aavee thake karam kamaae |
lines.english: This mind cannot be controlled; they are tired of performing religious rituals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਖਧਾਰੀ ਭੇਖ ਕਰਿ ਥਕੇ ਅਠਿਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhekhadhaaree bhekh kar thake atthisatth teerath naae |
lines.english: The impersonators have grown weary of wearing false costumes, and bathing at the sixty-eight sacred shrines.
